Personal Information

Name: Reuven Mandelovich

Role: Information Systems Engineering Student & IT Ops Manager

Email: mandelreuven2002@gmail.com

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/reuven-click

Website: https://lp.reuven.click

Summary

Reuven is a 3rd-year B.Sc. student in Information Systems Engineering at the Technion (Israel Institute of Technology). He is currently pursuing a Data Protection Officer (DPO) certification at Tel-Aviv University. He has robust experience across IT operations, system administration, application development, automation, and technological process improvement.

Technical Skills

Programming Languages: C, Python, Java, SQL, HTML

Platforms & Tools: OutSystems, Make, Zoho, Airtable, GCP, Microsoft 365, Google Workspace

Concepts: IT Operations, DevOps, DataOps, Automation, ERD, Agile Methodology, QA, Project Management, OKRs tracking.

Languages: Hebrew (Native), English (Fluent)

Professional Experience

IT Operations and Automation Manager @ Volta Solar (2023-2024): Led IT operations, managed budgets, tracked OKRs, maintained system availability, and developed cross-departmental automations.

Developer @ Volta Solar (2022-2023): Developed internal tools using SQL, OutSystems, and Make. Handled API integrations and QA.

ICT and Computer Supervisor @ National Service (2020-2022): Led ICT projects for the Education Corps.

Education

B.Sc. Information Systems Engineering - Technion, Haifa (2023-Present)

Data Protection Officer (DPO) Certification - Tel-Aviv University (2024-Present)

Volunteering

Audit Committee Member - Israeli Role-Playing Games Association (2025-Present)
